secondary.resetDescription: You have hit your 5-hour limit, it will refresh in 3 hours, 42 minutes. If on a supported paid plan, you can use AI credits in the interim.

primary.resetDescription: You have used some of your 5-hour limit, it will fully refresh in 3 hours, 41 minutes.
